parameters.jsCode:
const taskCard = $json.task_card;

const lines = [
  '═══ TASK PLAN — AWAITING YOUR GO-AHEAD ═══',
  `Task ID: ${taskCard.task_id}`,
  `Directive: ${taskCard.directive}`,
  `Type: ${taskCard.task_type}`,
  '',
  'Constitution principles:',
  ...(taskCard.constitution_principles_used || []).map(p => `  • ${p}`),
  '',
  `Librarian note: ${taskCard.librarian_note || 'None'}`,
  '',
  'Sub-tasks:',
  ...(taskCard.sub_tasks || []).map(t =>
    `  Step ${t.step} → [${t.agent.toUpperCase()}]: ${t.action}`
  ),
  '',
  'Review the plan above. When ready, direct each agent in turn.',
];

return {
  task_id: taskCard.task_id,
  task_card: taskCard,
  approval_summary: lines.join('\n'),
  status: 'awaiting_your_direction',
};
